subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! This is the time for supplication and entreaty, the hour of humility and contrition, with hands upraised in helplessness and need [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی هنگام تضرع و ابتهالست و وقت تذلل و انکسار دست عجز و نیاز
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for protection, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
